buildings.name: Grain Exchange
buildings.desc: A trading floor for the harvest — farmers capture the price, not the middleman. Agriculture +20%.

buildings.name: Waterworks
buildings.desc: Clean water on tap — the cheapest public health there is. Services +5%, satisfaction +5.

buildings.name: Market Hall
buildings.desc: Stalls, scales, and a clock tower — commerce gets a home. Services +20%.

buildings.name: Hospital
buildings.desc: Wards and trained nurses; the town sleeps easier. Services +10%, satisfaction +4.

buildings.name: Ironworks
buildings.desc: Blast furnaces and rolling mills — the muscle of an industrial town. Industry +20%.

buildings.name: Factory
buildings.desc: The assembly line: one roof, a thousand identical things a day. Industry +25%.

buildings.name: Power Station
buildings.desc: Light after dark and power on demand: every sector works better wired. All sectors +10%.

buildings.name: Telegraph Office
buildings.desc: Wires to the horizon — news arrives before the dust of the rider. Information +15%, survey range +2.

buildings.name: University
buildings.desc: Lecture halls and laboratories — the town starts selling ideas. Information +30%, research +15%.

buildings.name: Data Exchange
buildings.desc: Racks, cables, and cold air: the information economy's freight yard. Information +40%.

buildings.name: Harbor
buildings.desc: A deep-water quay for merchant ships — opens the sea lanes and raises coastal industry. Industry +15%, satisfaction +2. Coastal towns only. Enables warship recruitment.

buildings.name: The Great Granary
buildings.desc: WONDER — vaulted stores that never run dry. Every town in your realm farms +12%. One may stand in all the world.

buildings.name: The Grand Bazaar
buildings.desc: WONDER — a covered market the size of a town, where every road's trade converges. Realm-wide services +12%. One only, anywhere.

buildings.name: The Great Foundry
buildings.desc: WONDER — furnaces that light the night sky for a generation. Every town's industry +12%. One only, anywhere.

buildings.name: The Great Library
buildings.desc: WONDER — the gathered knowledge of an age under one roof. Realm-wide information +12%. One only, anywhere.

buildings.name: The Centuria Monument
buildings.desc: WONDER — the capstone of the century: a monument every citizen knows. All sectors +5% across the realm, and the greatest prestige of the age. One only, anywhere.

districts.name: Farming District
districts.desc: DISTRICT — a zoned belt of fields, granaries and irrigation. Agriculture +5%, and +5% more for each adjacent farm building (up to 3). Place it at the heart of your farms.

districts.name: Industrial Park
districts.desc: DISTRICT — a zoned quarter of mills, yards and rail spurs. Industry +5%, and +5% more for each adjacent works (up to 3). Cluster your factories around it.

districts.name: Commercial District
districts.desc: DISTRICT — a zoned downtown of exchanges, shops and offices. Services +5%, and +5% more for each adjacent market building (up to 3). Site it among your trade.

districts.name: Research Campus
districts.desc: DISTRICT — a zoned campus of labs, libraries and lecture halls. Information +5%, and +5% more for each adjacent institute (up to 3). Anchor your knowledge quarter.
